ast.source: The server closed the connection while sending
ast.target: 服务器在发送时关闭了连接

ast.name: log
ast.source: Logger.setLevel is deprecated, it will has no effect. Please, use client.setLogLevel instead.
ast.target: Logger.setLevel 已弃用，将不再生效。请改用 client.setLogLevel。

ast.name: log
ast.source: sender already has some hanging states. reconnecting
ast.target: 发送方已有一些挂起状态。正在重新连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your pin code. Numbers and letters only.
ast.target: 输入您的PIN码。仅限数字和字母。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter list of usernames or chat ids that should be processed. At least your username must be entered.
ast.target: 输入需要处理的用户名或聊天ID列表。至少必须输入您的用户名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the device to be used for sync when running Obsidian simultaneously on multiple desktops. If not specified, the priority will shift unpredictably.
ast.target: 指定在多个桌面同时运行Obsidian时用于同步的设备。如果未指定，优先级将不可预测地转移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Encrypt the bot token for enhanced security. When enabled, a pin code is required at each Obsidian launch.
ast.target: 加密机器人令牌以增强安全性。启用后，每次启动Obsidian都需要输入PIN码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your password before scanning the code only if you use two-step authorization. Password will not be stored
ast.target: 仅在使用两步验证时，在扫描代码前输入您的密码。密码不会被存储

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the Telegram app and link your device
ast.target: 打开Telegram应用并链接您的设备

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate code and point your phone at it to confirm login
ast.target: 生成代码并将手机对准它以确认登录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The session will appear in the list of active sessions
ast.target: 会话将出现在活跃会话列表中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the parameter (will be used as {{ai:name}})

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompt that describes what AI should generate for this parameter
ast.target: 描述AI应为此参数生成什么内容的提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new category for organizing notes
ast.target: 创建一个用于组织笔记的新类别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Conditions by which you would like to filter messages. Leave the field blank if you want to apply this rule to all messages
ast.target: 您希望用于过滤消息的条件。如果想将此规则应用于所有消息，请将此字段留空

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the heading under which new messages will be inserted
ast.target: 指定新消息将插入到哪个标题下

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on to have new messages appear at the beginning of the note, or, if a heading is specified, above it. This may disrupt message order if parallel processing is enabled
ast.target: 开启后，新消息将出现在笔记的开头，或者如果指定了标题，则出现在标题上方。如果启用了并行处理，这可能会打乱消息顺序

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use vision for image analysis (requires compatible model)
ast.target: 使用视觉功能进行图像分析（需要兼容的模型）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls randomness (0-2). Lower = more focused, higher = more creative
ast.target: 控制随机性（0-2）。较低 = 更专注，较高 = 更具创造性

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base delay between retries (will increase exponentially)
ast.target: 重试之间的基础延迟（将呈指数增长）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum time to wait for API response

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to all processed content for final formatting. Used when no specific prompt is set or as a final formatting step.
ast.target: 应用于所有处理内容以进行最终格式化。当未设置特定提示词时使用，或作为最终格式化步骤。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Processing for voice messages, audio files, and videos
ast.target: 语音消息、音频文件和视频的处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Processing for web links sent in messages (via r.jina.ai)
ast.target: 消息中发送的网络链接的处理（通过r.jina.ai）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on for faster message and file processing. Caution: may disrupt message order
ast.target: 开启以加快消息和文件处理速度。注意：可能会打乱消息顺序

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when you want to see the connection status indicator
ast.target: 选择您希望何时看到连接状态指示器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose chats with your connected bot in which to search for old messages. Only chats with activity in the last 30 days will be available. If no chat is chosen, old message processing will not occur
ast.target: 选择您已连接的机器人所在的聊天，以搜索旧消息。仅过去30天内有活动的聊天可用。如果未选择聊天，则不会处理旧消息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect your Telegram bot. It's required for all features.
ast.target: 连接您的Telegram机器人。所有功能都需要它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect your Telegram user. It's required only for
ast.target: 连接您的Telegram用户。仅在以下情况下需要：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: During the plugin loading, unprocessed messages that are older than 24 hours and are not accessible to the bot will be forwarded to the same chat using the connected user's account. This action will enable the bot to detect and process these messages
ast.target: 在插件加载期间，超过24小时且机器人无法访问的未处理消息将使用已连接用户的账户转发到同一聊天。此操作将使机器人能够检测并处理这些消息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process messages through AI before saving. Each content type can have its own prompt.
ast.target: 在保存前通过AI处理消息。每种内容类型都可以有自己的提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure AI prompts for different content types (text, voice, photos, etc.)
ast.target: 为不同内容类型（文本、语音、照片等）配置AI提示词

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extract text from documents locally to save costs and improve speed
ast.target: 在本地从文档中提取文本以节省成本并提高速度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically categorize notes based on content
ast.target: 根据内容自动分类笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base folder for URL-only messages when AI web links processing is disabled (path: folder/domain.md)
ast.target: 当AI网络链接处理被禁用时，仅包含URL的消息的基础文件夹（路径：folder/domain.md）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use AI to automatically determine note categories
ast.target: 使用AI自动确定笔记类别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable AI processing first to use AI categorization
ast.target: 首先启用AI处理以使用AI分类

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save notes to folders based on categories
ast.target: 根据类别将笔记保存到文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Category for notes that don't match any rules
ast.target: 不符合任何规则的笔记的类别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Bot token encryption using a pin code
ast.target: 使用PIN码加密机器人令牌

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 消息之间的默认分隔符\"***\"

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 关键词1, 关键词2, 关键词3

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: E.g., determine project name from text (maximum 20 characters)
ast.target: 例如：从文本中确定项目名称（最多20个字符）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: - it can get only messages sent within the last 24 hours
ast.target: - 它只能获取过去24小时内发送的消息

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Use a proxy to bypass blocks in some countries and limited corporate networks
ast.target: 使用代理绕过某些国家和受限企业网络的封锁

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 请先启用人工智能分类

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 测试 API 密钥有效性

ast.target: 下载文件时连续两次超时

ast.target: options.requestBodyStream 已弃用，请将请求对象传递给 stream.pipe。

ast.target: 请同时填写参数名称和提示词

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini 支持视觉 API

ast.target: 为不同类型的内容配置提示词。每种内容类型都可以有其特定的 AI 处理提示词。
